name: October CMS
description: Laravel-based CMS engineered for simplicity with powerful Tailor content modeling

description.value: Laravel-based CMS engineered for simplicity with powerful Tailor content modeling

license.comment: Source-available but requires paid license per website deployment; one free license available

github-stars.comment: Approximately 11.1k stars as of research date

cms-type.comment: Traditional CMS with Twig templating; no native headless API but can be extended with plugins

primary-language.comment: Built on Laravel framework; PHP 53.4%, JavaScript 37.3%

database-support.comment: Uses Laravel's database abstraction layer supporting standard SQL databases

api-type.comment: No built-in REST or GraphQL API; requires custom development or plugins for headless use

multi-tenancy.comment: Supports multisite functionality with Tailor blueprints

static-site-generation.comment: No native SSG support; serves dynamic pages

edge-deployment.comment: Traditional server-side rendering; no edge deployment features

content-types.comment: Tailor allows defining custom content types via YAML blueprints (Entry, Single, Structure, Stream, Global types)

custom-fields.comment: Extensive field types via Tailor blueprints and form field system

field-types.comment: Includes Text, Rich Editor, Media Finder, Record Finder, Data Table, Repeater, Nested Form, and many more

content-relationships.comment: Full Eloquent ORM relationship support; Record Finder and Relation fields in Tailor

nested-components.comment: Grouped Repeater allows reusable content blocks with predefined field configurations

localization.comment: JSON-based localization with pluralization; Tailor blueprints support multisite translation

content-validation.comment: Validation rules with create/update modifiers; unique rule automatically configured

embedded-interactives.comment: CMS components can be embedded in content; supports AJAX framework for interactive elements

content-versioning.comment: Planned feature for Tailor (in consideration as of Oct 2024); not yet available

draft-publish.comment: Tailor blueprints support drafts property; entries can be saved before publication

scheduled-publishing.comment: No native scheduled publishing in core; may require plugin

content-locking.comment: No built-in content locking to prevent concurrent editing

audit-logging.comment: Not built-in; available via third-party plugins like Jacob Logbook or RainLab User plugin

media-library.comment: Built-in Media Manager with Media Finder form widget

image-transformations.comment: Resizer service with crop, fit, exact, auto modes; quality and sharpen controls

external-media-storage.comment: Flysystem-based storage supporting Amazon S3 via league/flysystem-aws-s3-v3

video-support.comment: Media Manager supports video file uploads

svg-support.comment: SVG files can be uploaded via Media Manager

folder-organization.comment: Directory management with makeDirectory and deleteDirectory operations

role-based-access.comment: Built-in roles (developer, publisher) with custom role creation; role hierarchy via sort_order

granular-permissions.comment: Dot-notation permission codes; controller/feature level but not field-level permissions

sso-saml.comment: Not documented; would require plugin or custom development

team-collaboration.comment: Groups for notifications but no built-in comments, assignments, or collaboration features

audience-restrictions.comment: Via RainLab User plugin; supports user groups and access control

typescript-sdk.comment: PHP-based CMS; no official TypeScript SDK

content-type-sdk.comment: Tailor blueprints use YAML files; also supports plugin-based model definitions

cli-tools.comment: Artisan CLI with scaffolding, migrations, tailor:migrate, and custom command support

local-development.comment: Developer Docker image available; dev/test/staging share single license

webhooks.comment: Not built-in; available via plugins like Syehan Webhook or Bedard Webhooks

plugin-system.comment: Extensive plugin marketplace with hundreds of extensions; custom plugin development supported

admin-ui-customization.comment: Backend customization via plugins; form widgets and UI elements configurable

documentation-quality.comment: Good documentation with structured guides, API reference, and tutorials; v3.x and v4.x docs available

frontend-frameworks.comment: Traditional CMS with built-in Twig templating; no official frontend framework integrations

search-integration.comment: No built-in search; requires plugin for advanced search functionality

preview-mode.comment: Live preview available in backend editor

ecommerce-integration.comment: E-commerce plugins available in marketplace; handles 180K+ product catalogs

analytics-integration.comment: No built-in analytics; requires plugin or manual integration

cdn-included.comment: Self-hosted; no CDN included (configure your own)

response-caching.comment: Laravel's caching capabilities; configurable page and response caching

global-regions.comment: Self-hosted; deploy to any region of your choice

free-tier.comment: One free license available; includes one year of updates, renewable at $39/year

open-source.comment: Source-available but proprietary EULA; license required per website

pricing-model.comment: One free license, then $39/license or $312/year unlimited subscription

commercial-support.comment: Premium support services available; Partner Program for unlimited subscribers

enterprise-features.comment: No dedicated enterprise tier; Partner Program offers two-way dialogue and visibility
